owner_boundary.summary: Lode declares success conditions and output shape only. Core decides when to run the check and Harbor owns live source and evidence refs.

status_meaning.passed: Required public fields are present and bound to declared source/evidence refs.
status_meaning.failed: One or more required public fields or bindings are missing or inconsistent.
status_meaning.skipped: The check did not run because admission or runtime conditions were not met.

result_contract.source_ref_policy: Use source ref ids declared by fixture or Core result source refs.
result_contract.evidence_ref_policy: Use evidence ref ids declared by fixture or Harbor/Core evidence refs; do not inline bodies.

requirements.description: The normalized result identifies the BOSS job detail target as located.
Required normalized fields have source and evidence ref binding.

fixture_post_check_output.reason: The redacted fixture contains required public fields and binds them to placeholder source/evidence refs.

failure_boundary.post_check_failed: Required public result fields or ref bindings are absent or inconsistent.
failure_boundary.field_missing: A required normalized field is not traceable to declared source/evidence refs.
failure_boundary.network_resource_unavailable: Required evidence refs are absent, expired, or unavailable.

non_goals: No browser automation steps in Lode.
No Harbor evidence schema or live evidence body.
